mapper.select: SELECT * FROM DEPOSIT_AUTO_TRANSFER_TBL WHERE transfer_day = #{today} AND transfer_status = 'ACTIVE'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO DEPOSIT_AUTO_TRANSFER_TBL (withdraw_account_number, target_account_number, target_account_type, transfer_amount, transfer_day, transfer_status, created_at) VALUES (#{withdrawAccountNumber}, #{targetAccountNumber}, #{targetAccountType}, #{transferAmount}, #{transferDay}, #{transferStatus}, now())
mapper.select: SELECT id, withdraw_account_number AS withdrawAccountNumber, target_account_number AS targetAccountNumber, target_account_type AS targetAccountType, transfer_amount AS transferAmount, transfer_day AS transferDay, transfer_status AS transferStatus, created_at AS createdAt FROM DEPOSIT_AUTO_TRANSFER_TBL WHERE withdraw_account_number = #{withdrawAccountNumber} AND transfer_status = 'ACTIVE'
mapper.update: UPDATE DEPOSIT_AUTO_TRANSFER_TBL SET target_account_number = #{targetAccountNumber}, target_account_type = #{targetAccountType}, transfer_amount = #{transferAmount}, transfer_day = #{transferDay}, transfer_status = #{transferStatus} WHERE id = #{id}
